zh.lifeSummary: 當John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan於大約1450年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親John MacIain Brayach MacDonald22歲，母親Elizabeth Welchford Livingston19歲。他於大約1470年與Marietta MacDonald在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1513年登記服兵役。他於1495年被列為baillie - an official of the scottish government。他去世於1518年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文享年69歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan于大约1450年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲John MacIain Brayach MacDonald22岁，母亲Elizabeth Welchford Livingston19岁。他于大约1470年与Marietta MacDonald在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1513年登记服兵役。他于1495年被列为baillie - an official of the scottish government。他去世于1518年在苏格兰阿吉爾莫文享年69岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: MacIain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: Castilianized form of Matxain, a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with a diminutive of the personal name Martin .

variants.name: Martin
meanings: English, Scottish, Irish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, Flemish, German, Czech, Slovak, Croatian, Italian (Veneto); Spanish (Martín): from a personal name derived from Latin Martinus, itself a derivative of Mars, genitive Martis, the Roman god of fertility and war, whose name may derive ultimately from a root mar ‘gleam’. This was borne by a famous 4th-century Christian saint, Martin of Tours, and consequently became extremely popular throughout Europe in the Middle Ages. In North America, the surname Martin has absorbed cognates and derivatives from other languages, e.g. Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Marcin , Albanian Martini , Polish surnames beginning with Marcin-, and Slovenian patronymics like Martinčič (see Martincic ). Martin is the most frequent surname in France and one of the most frequent surnames in Wallonia.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Mártain, ‘descendant of Martin’ (compare 1 above). Otherwise, a shortened form of Gilmartin or McMartin ; sometimes also spelled Martyn.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: 'Brayach'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Czech and Slovak Bradáč, Slovenian and Croatian Bradač (see Bradac ).

variants.name: Bradac
meanings: Czech and Slovak (Bradáč); Slovenian and Croatian (Bradač): descriptive nickname from bradáč, bradač ‘bearded man’, a derivative of brada ‘beard’. Compare Bart 1 and Bradach .

en.lifeSummary: When John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan was born about 1450, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, John MacIain Brayach MacDonald, was 22 and his mother, Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, was 19. He married Marietta MacDonald about 1470, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1513. In 1495, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as baillie - an official of the scottish government. He died in 1518, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan est né environ 1450, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, John MacIain Brayach MacDonald, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Marietta MacDonald environ 1470, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1513. En 1495, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est baillie - an official of the scottish government. Il est décédé en 1518, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan um 1450 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John MacIain Brayach MacDonald 22 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Welchford Livingston 19. Er hat um 1470 in Scotland Marietta MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1513 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1495, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als baillie - an official of the scottish government aufgeführt. Er starb 1518 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Morven, Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan è nato il circa 1450 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, John MacIain Brayach MacDonald, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Marietta MacDonald circa 1470, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1513. Nel 1495, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come baillie - an official of the scottish government. Morì nel 1518, nel Morven, Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchanが約1450年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父John MacIain Brayach MacDonaldは22歳，母Elizabeth Welchford Livingstonは19歳であった。約1470年にスコットランドでMarietta MacDonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年に兵役登録をした。1495年，46歳の時，職業はbaillie - an official of the scottish governmentと記録されている。彼は1518年にスコットランドアルグイルモーベンで69歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan(이)가 대략 1450년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John MacIain Brayach MacDonald(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Welchford Livingston(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1470년 스컷랜드에서 Marietta MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1495년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 baillie - an official of the scottish government이었다. 그는 1518년 스컷랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John MacIain Brayach MacDonald, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Marietta MacDonald aproximadamente 1470, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1513. Em 1495, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como baillie - an official of the scottish government. Ele faleceu em 1518, em Morven, Argyll, Scotland, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan родился около 1450 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John MacIain Brayach MacDonald было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marietta MacDonald около 1470 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. В 1513 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1495 году, в возрасте 46 лет, работал по профессии baillie - an official of the scottish government. Он умер в 1518 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

sm.from 1493 to 1518: mai le 1493 e o'o I le 1518

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John  'Brayach' MacIain 6th. Lord of Ardnamurchan nació aproximadamente 1450, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John MacIain Brayach MacDonald, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Welchford Livingston, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Marietta MacDonald aproximadamente 1470, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1513. En 1495, a la edad de 46 años, su ocupación registrada era baillie - an official of the scottish government. Murió en 1518, en Morven, Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
